evals.name: payment-gateway-contract
evals.prompt: I have a Java interface called `PaymentGateway`. I want to add an AI-Architectural Contract to it. The rules are: 1. Implementation must be thread-safe. 2. It must use a dedicated 'payment' logger. 3. No external API calls are allowed in the constructor. Write the Javadoc contract.
evals.expected_output: A Java interface code snippet with Javadoc containing [AI ARCHITECTURAL CONTRACT], @apiNote, @implSpec with thread-safe and logger rules, @implNote with constructor rule, and an @example.

evals.name: user-repository-harden
evals.prompt: Generate an AI-Native architectural contract for my `AbstractUserRepository`. It should ensure that all subclasses use `@Repository` annotation, never return `null` (use `Optional` instead), and must implement a caching strategy in the implementation layer. Provide an example.
evals.expected_output: Javadoc for AbstractUserRepository with [AI ARCHITECTURAL CONTRACT], including @implSpec for @Repository and Optional, and @implNote for caching requirement.
